positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description: Analyzed 2B+ daily Reels impressions, views, and watch-time events across Facebook and Instagram using SQL and Python, identifying engagement drivers that informed ranking improvements and lifting average watch time by 12%.
achievements: +6% watch time from 25+ large-scale A/B experiments per quarter, using hypothesis testing and causal analysis while protecting retention
+9% content-discovery CTR and +5% D30 retention from cohort analysis across 10+ user segments
40% faster analysis turnaround via scalable SQL/Python frameworks adopted across 5+ product teams; 15+ hrs/week of manual reporting eliminated with Tableau dashboards
+7% overall engagement across Reels and Feed from strategic recommendations that shaped 3 roadmap initiatives

positions.title: Data Analyst
positions.description: Analyzed 50M+ sales, inventory, and fulfillment records using SQL and Python to identify demand patterns and category-level trends, improving category planning accuracy by 10%.
achievements: $2M+ in lost sales prevented and 22% fewer stockouts via SQL frameworks flagging 5,000+ high-risk SKUs
+18% forecast accuracy from demand models using seasonality and promotional signals across high-volume segments
70% less manual reporting effort by automating forecasting in Python, cutting turnaround from days to hours
Informed $10M+ in inventory investment decisions; sustained 99%+ in-stock rate through a 30%+ Prime Day demand surge
